summary: TAQA BRATANI LIMITED (LEI: 213800E11LI1SCETU492; GB Companies House: 05975475) is identifier-confirmed and registered in the United Kingdom. The entity's direct and ultimate accounting parent is شركة أبوظبى الوطنية للطاقة - ش م ع (TAQA), per GLEIF Level 2 relationship data, and UK Companies House records confirm that the Abu Dhabi Government holds significant influence or control over the company; TAQA Bratani also holds a shareholding in the Brae Group per OpenSanctions. Current directors recorded at both UK Companies House and OpenCorporates are Alexander Burnett Hutchison (appointed 2015-09-17) and Franco Polo (appointed 2022-12-12), with Christopher Graham Ross Rettie recorded as a senior managing official from 2025-03-12. A structural risk signal of high confidence has been raised reflecting that the ownership chain reaches into jurisdictions outside the EU/EEA (United Kingdom), a condition relevant under AMLA CDD RTS criterion (b); this is a jurisdictional indicator for further review and not a determination of wrongdoing. A material limitation applies: OpenSanctions data is licensed under CC-BY-NC-4.0, meaning commercial re-use of that source is not permitted, and findings derived from it should be treated accordingly.

A high-confidence structural risk signal has been raised indicating that the ownership chain reaches into jurisdictions outside the EU/EEA (United Kingdom), relevant under AMLA CDD RTS criterion (b); this is a jurisdictional indicator for further review and not a determination of wrongdoing.
